overview: An advanced interactive educational web app that visualizes how a CPU executes instructions internally using micro-operations across clock cycles. Users select instructions like ADD, SUB, LOAD, or STORE and watch animated data flow between CPU components step by step.
features: Animated CPU diagram with Memory, PC, MAR, MDR, IR, ALU, and Registers
Step-by-step micro-operation visualization across clock cycles T0–T5
Play, Pause, Next, Previous, and Reset simulation controls
Beginner and Advanced modes with component tooltips
Neon glow dark theme with smooth animated data-flow arrows
Real-time register value updates and ALU operation display
Progress bar and info panel for current execution step
